onboarding.title: Meta Analytics
onboarding.subtitle: Pull page stats and posts from public Facebook pages
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: No sample data — this template scrapes live Facebook data via the Apify API.

steps.title: Add your Apify Token
steps.description: Sign up at apify.com and paste your token from console.apify.com/account/integrations.

steps.title: Run an Operation
steps.description: Pull page stats or recent posts from any public Facebook page.

steps.title: Browse Results
steps.description: Every run is saved to history.

reference.overview: Wraps Apify's Facebook page and post scrapers. Read-only.

concepts.name: Page
concepts.description: Public page stats — followers, likes, category, about.

concepts.name: Posts
concepts.description: Recent posts with text, like/comment/share counts.

prompts: How many followers does facebook.com/nasa have?
Show me the last 10 posts from facebook.com/natgeo
Compare follower counts for nike, adidas Facebook pages
tips: Profiles, groups, and ads are not in scope — use page URLs only.
Each Apify run costs you compute on apify.com — keep postsLimit small while testing.
Your APIFY_TOKEN unlocks the same actors across all four apify-* templates.
